creator: zeising@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Antoine Brodin from comment #4)
Hi!
Thanks for the run!
I noticed there's an upstream update available for multimedia/bino.  I'll try that one and see if I can get things going.
multimedia/bino hasn't been updated since 2013 (apart from bumps and stuff), and the last version update was probably not (looking at the logs) done by the maintainer.  I'm not sure if it is used.
If I'm unable to fix it, is it possible to get this approved anyway?
